seoTitle: How to Migrate Your Google Workspace Account in 2026
metaDescription: Merging businesses or switching domains? Here's how to migrate Gmail, Drive, Contacts, and Calendar between Google Workspace accounts without data loss.
intro: Moving an entire Google Workspace setup — Gmail, Drive, Contacts, and Calendar — from one organization or domain to another is a common need when businesses merge or restructure. This guide covers using Google Workspace's admin migration tools to move users and data safely, including how to route or forward email during the transition. It's built for admins who need a clean switch without losing sharing permissions or access along the way.

steps.heading: Plan your migration using Admin tools
steps.body: Start in the Google Workspace Admin Console to map out which users and data need to move to the new organization or domain.

steps.heading: Set up the data migration service
steps.body: Use Google's data migration service to transfer Gmail, Drive files, and Contacts from the old account to the new one.

steps.heading: Route or forward email during the switch
steps.body: Configure email routing or forwarding so messages keep reaching users while the migration is in progress, avoiding gaps in communication.

steps.heading: Migrate users between Workspace accounts
steps.body: Move user accounts over to the new Workspace tenant, keeping their data and access tied to the correct identities.

steps.heading: Preserve sharing permissions and access
steps.body: Check that file sharing permissions and access rights carry over correctly so users aren't locked out of shared documents after the move.

faq.question: Will I lose emails or files during a Google Workspace migration?
faq.answer: The migration is designed to preserve data when done through Google's official data migration service, though it's still worth verifying key items transferred correctly afterward.

faq.question: Can I migrate just some users instead of the whole organization?
faq.answer: Yes, migrating users between Google Workspace accounts can be done selectively rather than requiring every user to move at once.

faq.question: What tools does Google recommend for large-scale migrations?
faq.answer: The guide points to Google's own data migration service and admin tools as the recommended approach, especially for handling larger migrations.

faq.question: How do I avoid downtime for email during the switch?
faq.answer: Setting up email routing or forwarding during the migration helps ensure messages keep arriving for users while their accounts are being moved.
